channel.title: harbor on yy小站
channel.description: Recent content in harbor on yy小站

item.title: Docker安装harbor
item.description: 官方文档入口 配置 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 wget https://github.com/goharbor/harbor/releases/download/v2.5.0/harbor-offline-installer-v2.5.0.tgz tar zxf harbor-offline-installer-v2.5.0.tgz && cd harbor cp harbor.yml.tmpl harbor.yml 参考openssl自签名证书 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 8 9 sudo mkdir -p /data/harbor/cert sudo cp mkl.io.key mkl.io.crt /data/harbor/cert openssl x509 -inform PEM -in mkl.io.crt -out mkl.io.cert sudo mkdir -p /etc/docker/certs.d/harbor.mkl.io
